Calcium Blood Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a calcium blood test? 
A calcium blood test measures the amount of calcium in your blood. Too much or too little calcium in your blood may be a sign of a wide range of medical conditions, such as bone disease , thyroid diseas e, parathyroid disorders , kidney disease , and other conditions.
